privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring content access on a local WordPress site where posts are synthetically generated via setup scripts. Verified requirements include creating a 'Staff Resources Portal' page with the exact password 'LibAccess2024!' and specific welcome text, updating 'Getting Started with WordPress' to 'private' status, updating '10 Essential WordPress Plugins' to 'draft' status, creating a 'Collection Development Policy' private page containing the keyword 'deaccessioning', and creating a published 'Accessing Restricted Resources' page containing the text 'Contact the library director'.
